name: treasure room
hints: A treasure room with a coffer and a barred window. The window leads outside!
The barred window needs the saw to cut through. The coffer contains treasures.
SAW BAR to cut through the window bars, then GO BAR to reach the pyramid top.
SAW BAR opens the window. GO BAR leads to pyramid top (room 23) with the platinum bar. LOO COF for treasures. D=throne room (21).
notes: Treasure room above the throne room. Coffer has treasures. SAW BAR on the window to access pyramid top (23). D=throne room (21).
